block_01: This is the second article of our most extensive guide on choosing your own trading strategy. We’ve already talked about the difference in approaches depending on the asset and timeframe. Today we are focusing on internal factors that influence your trading.
block_02: Is there any difference in the goals that traders set for themselves? And how to navigate in the world of trading if you are completely new here? In this article we are looking deeper into these matters to provide you with an ultimate guide.
block_03: Tip: check every link that’s specified in the article. We have linked the most useful topics that you may find helpful. And, of course, if you haven’t read Part 1 of our guide, you may want to start with it!
